# docs(agentos): de-stale MemoryCore.md (local models, unified Chroma, telepathy)

Part of #14310 · follow the content rubric pinned on #14310. Refs #14310.

**Problem:** `MemoryCore.md` documents Google `text-embedding-004` + Gemini 2.5 Flash; deployed reality is local qwen3/gemma (remote optional); 2-collection framing; its prose contradicts its own healthcheck block.

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] Embedding/summary providers described provider-agnostic — local default (qwen3/gemma) **or** remote (Gemini) — matching the healthcheck block.
- [ ] Unified Chroma; A2A / telepathy / provenance / trust-tier framing (v13 institution); 5+ MCP servers.
- [ ] Per the content rubric (why-care, not just mechanics).

**Files:** `learn/agentos/MemoryCore.md`.
